VARcheck 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting started

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

VARcheck 0.1.0

  • Initial CRAN release.
  • new_var_data(): constructs a model-agnostic var_data object from empirical data, predictions, residuals, and optional simulated data. Accepts a single matrix (single subject) or a list of matrices (multiple subjects).
  • plot_var_check(): assembles a multi-panel diagnostic grid — one row per variable — with empirical vs. predicted time series, residual inspection, a residuals vs. predictions scatter, and optional posterior predictive check panels.
  • theme_varcheck(): default minimal ggplot2 theme used by plot_var_check(), available for standalone use.

Developed by Björn S. Siepe, Jonas M. B. Haslbeck.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
